title: Yijing Hexagram 53: Jian (Development)
description: Hexagram 53 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 53 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Development. The maiden is given in marriage. Good fortune. Perseverance furthers.
